title: Russian Fishing 4

notes:
The game works flawless for me. It seems to hang after the epilepsy warning on start, but after pressing Esc is just starts up normally and everything runs smooth without issue.

The only issue I have is actually exiting the game. It seems to hang with the message "Exiting" and I need to kill the process manually. Not a real problem with the game per se though.

I'm using Mesa Git with ACO Compiler.
title: Russian Fishing 4
